loop.player_action: Move from safety toward the visible gate objective.
loop.feedback: Camera, title HUD, and landmark confirm orientation.

loop.player_action: Inspect a hazard or enemy tell before committing.
loop.feedback: Danger is visible before damage or failure.

loop.player_action: Choose to fight, avoid, or back out.
loop.feedback: Health/stamina and encounter state update immediately.

loop.player_action: Use reward, recovery, or upgrade choice before going deeper.
loop.feedback: The next risk is clearer because the state changed.
